item.title: The Crash That Sparked Countless Questions
item.description: Diane Schuler was involved in a devastating wrong way collision that claimed multiple lives and stunned the nation. Toxicology results, unanswered questions, and competing explanations have fueled years of debate about what happened in the hours leading up to the crash.

media:content.media:title: The Crash That Sparked Countless Questions
media:content.media:description: Diane Schuler was involved in a devastating wrong way collision that claimed multiple lives and stunned the nation. Toxicology results, unanswered questions, and competing explanations have fueled years of debate about what happened in the hours leading up to the crash.

item.title: A Child's Tragic Case Sparked Years Of Reflection
item.description: The murder of 10 year old Katie Collman devastated her family and community, leading to a major criminal investigation and a life sentence for the person responsible. The case continues to be discussed as a reminder of the lasting impact violent crime has on victims' loved ones and entire communities.

media:content.media:title: A Child's Tragic Case Sparked Years Of Reflection
media:content.media:description: The murder of 10 year old Katie Collman devastated her family and community, leading to a major criminal investigation and a life sentence for the person responsible. The case continues to be discussed as a reminder of the lasting impact violent crime has on victims' loved ones and entire communities.

item.title: A Teen Romance Took A Dark And Tragic Turn
item.description: Rose Larner's life was cut short after a teenage relationship spiraled into violence. The heartbreaking case drew widespread attention and highlighted the dangers of possessiveness, control, and escalating conflict among young couples.

media:content.media:title: A Teen Romance Took A Dark And Tragic Turn
media:content.media:description: Rose Larner's life was cut short after a teenage relationship spiraled into violence. The heartbreaking case drew widespread attention and highlighted the dangers of possessiveness, control, and escalating conflict among young couples.

item.title: The Missing Woman Mystery That Turned Out To Be A Lie
item.description: When Carlee Russell vanished after calling 911 to report a toddler walking along an Alabama interstate, the story captured national attention. But after a massive search and days of speculation, investigators concluded the kidnapping never happened, transforming the case into one of the most infamous disappearance hoaxes in recent memory.

media:content.media:title: The Missing Woman Mystery That Turned Out To Be A Lie
media:content.media:description: When Carlee Russell vanished after calling 911 to report a toddler walking along an Alabama interstate, the story captured national attention. But after a massive search and days of speculation, investigators concluded the kidnapping never happened, transforming the case into one of the most infamous disappearance hoaxes in recent memory.

item.title: A Trusted Counselor Crossed Every Line
item.description: Jodi Hildebrandt built a reputation as a counselor and relationship expert, but former clients later accused her of manipulation and emotional harm. Her involvement in a high profile abuse case brought intense scrutiny to her methods and the influence she held over those around her.

media:content.media:title: A Trusted Counselor Crossed Every Line
media:content.media:description: Jodi Hildebrandt built a reputation as a counselor and relationship expert, but former clients later accused her of manipulation and emotional harm. Her involvement in a high profile abuse case brought intense scrutiny to her methods and the influence she held over those around her.
